replace.why: Neutralize house-silhouette luminance mask: demo-only cutout of the demo house's skyline (white house / black sky, so paper texture showed through the sky). Any real property photo would be silhouette-clipped by the demo house shape; a true luminance mask would also self-mask dark photo areas. Hero must render full-bleed rectangular within clip 4473d9129e.

replace.why: Remove the orphaned mask def and its @@PHOTO0@@ grayscale silhouette image so compose never has to feed PHOTO0 anything.
